summary_en: 547,100 shares acquired for ¥847.9M during May 12–31, 2026 (on a contract basis). Cumulative progress represents 54.7% of the authorized 1,000,000-share limit and 84.8% of the ¥1,000M price ceiling. Execution window: May 12 – September 30, 2026. Method: open-market purchase via commitment contract on the TSE.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition Status of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: LITALICO Inc. reported the acquisition status of its treasury shares as of May 31, 2026. During the period May 12–31, 2026 (on a contract basis), the company acquired 547,100 shares of its common stock for a total of ¥847,948,300 through open-market purchase via a commitment contract on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. This acquisition is executed under the Articles of Incorporation authorized by a board resolution on May 11, 2026, which set a maximum acquisition of 1,000,000 shares (2.9% of issued shares excluding treasury shares) for up to ¥1,000,000,000 during the period May 12 – September 30, 2026. As of May 31, cumulative acquisition has reached 547,100 shares (54.7% of the share authorization) and ¥847,948,300 (84.8% of the yen ceiling), leaving room for further purchases through the September 30 deadline.
